title: [Deprecated] MCMV Pokémon ModPack
description:
(OUTDATED MODPACK) 
A Modpack made to experience Pokémon in minecraft, This was specifically made for the event in Minecraft Multiverse (MCMV)
body:
# THIS MODPACK IS DEPRECTATED/OUTDATED
PLEASE GO TO THE MCMV DISCORD AND GET THE NEW MODPACK WHENEVER IT COMES OUT


**Minecraft Muliverse**
Hello User! This Modpack was made to play Pokémon in Minecraft!
BUT!! This ModPack is planning to be used in the Minecraft Multiverse (MCMV) Event!

[Click Here for the Discord of MCMV](https://discord.gg/JP4PDVedwZ)
